response:
the sacred scripture of siriraghu mahala 3 speaks of the importance of the spirit and the divine language of the guru's grace gene is deeply rooted in the path of devotion and the visit to the true guru is essential for spiritual growth - the soul must merge with the self and understand the pure essence of the spirit - the true word of the lord is the divine language that leads to enlightenment and the soul becomes pure - the spirit is the key to the divine path and the visit to the guru is the way to attain it - the spirit is the light that guides the soul through the darkness of ignorance and the divine language is the path to salvation - the gene of devotion is passed down through generations and the visit to the guru is the way to awaken it - the spirit is the essence of the soul and the divine language is the way to connect with the divine - the visit to the guru is the way to awaken the spirit and the divine language is the path to enlightenment - the spirit is the light that guides the soul and the divine language is the way to reach the divine - the gene of devotion is the foundation of the spiritual journey and the visit to the guru is the way to fulfill it - the spirit is the essence of the soul and the divine language is the way to reach the divine.

***

the path of devotion is not complete without the guidance of the guru and the visit to the sacred place is essential for the spirit to grow - the divine language of the guru is the key to understanding the true nature of the spirit and the gene of devotion is passed on through generations - the soul must merge with the self and the spirit must be awakened through the divine language - the visit to the guru is the way to awaken the spirit and the divine language is the path to enlightenment - the gene of devotion is the foundation of the spiritual journey and the visit to the guru is the way to fulfill it - the spirit is the essence of the soul and the divine language is the way to reach the divine - the visit to the guru is the way to awaken the spirit and the divine language is the path to enlightenment - the gene of devotion is the foundation of the spiritual journey and the visit to the guru is the way to fulfill it - the spirit is the essence of the soul and the divine language is the way to reach the divine.
